data.title: Customer Obsession
data.description: Amazon prioritizes customer needs and satisfaction, defining its service model.
data.technical_spec: Feedback loops and personalized recommendations enhance user experience.

data.title: Operational Excellence
data.description: Continuous improvement and optimization are central to Amazon's operations.
data.technical_spec: Advanced logistics and AI-driven process optimizations.

data.title: Innovation Culture
data.description: Pioneering new technologies and methodologies to stay ahead in the market.
data.technical_spec: Investment in R&D and autonomous systems like drones (Prime Air).

data.title: Long-term Thinking
data.description: Strategic planning focused on sustainable growth rather than short-term gains.
data.technical_spec: Diversification and eco-friendly initiatives align with future goals.

data.title: Frugality
data.description: Efficient use of resources to keep costs low and provide better value to customers.
data.technical_spec: Automated scaling and resource optimization in cloud operations.
